Carlos Marshall Jr.

Position: Guard

6-6, 210lb (198cm, 95kg)

Hometown: Memphis, TN

High School: Southwind (TN)

Schools: Tennessee State (Men) and Santa Clara (Men)

  • 2x All-OVC
+2
